title: Clear Reasoning Foundations Program

summary: Twelve-module course map for attention, definitions, propositions, proof, inference, demonstration, dialectic, fallacies, rhetoric, disagreement, transfer, and capstone performance.

title: Clear Reasoning Objective IDs
summary: Stable CR-101 objective IDs for attention, definitions, propositions, proof craft, inference, dialectical questions, fallacy repair, ethical rhetoric, disagreement discipline, and capstone defense.

title: Clear Reasoning Assessment Bank
summary: Assessment bank for diagnostic essays, definition packets, proof reconstruction, fallacy repair, dialogue performance, change facilitation plans, and capstone defense with strong and weak work signals.

title: Clear Reasoning Misconception Map
summary: Misconception map for rhetorical victory, unstable definitions, fallacy-label shortcuts, charity concerns, proof transfer, persuasion ethics, confidence, change readiness, pressure, and relapse repair.

title: Reasoning Drills And Practice Labs
summary: Drill library including term lock, claim stack, proof step test, syllogism translation, steelman ladder, fallacy repair, question ladder, speech compression, eristic shield, debate and persuasion practice, and change facilitation research lab.

title: Debate And Persuasion Practice Lab
summary: Pressure ladder and scenario bank for friendly, skeptical, mixed-audience, combative, and disingenuous exchanges; trains term lock, observable tactic naming, ethical persuasion, and self-revision paths.

title: Change Facilitation Research Lab
summary: Research-guided practice for helping others see and sustain change through readiness, ambivalence, autonomy, self-efficacy, if-then plans, friction audit, social support, inoculation, and relapse repair.

title: Source Canon And Use Boundary
summary: Source canon and use boundaries for public-domain-safe great works, change research, comparative extensions, diagnostic adversarial sources, and source packet requirements.

title: Source Packet Readiness Index
summary: Deterministic index of Western approved source packets and comparative candidate packets, including original lesson readiness and no copied excerpt use.

title: Clear Reasoning Offline AI Knowledge Workflow
summary: Workflow rules for courseware integration, Voice Studio, lecture/video handoff, QA Live readiness, source rules, cross-civilizational rules, source packets, and offline AI knowledge seed maintenance.
